name: Claude-m Microsoft Marketplace
description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace for Microsoft 365, Teams, Excel, Outlook, Azure, and SharePoint integrations via MCP
author: Claude-m

plugins.name: Microsoft Teams MCP
plugins.description: Send messages, create meetings, and manage Microsoft Teams channels via MCP server

plugins.name: Microsoft Excel MCP
plugins.description: Read and write Excel workbooks, manage worksheets, and work with tables via MCP server

plugins.name: Microsoft Outlook MCP
plugins.description: Send emails, list inbox messages, and manage calendar events via MCP server

plugins.name: Microsoft Azure MCP
plugins.description: Manage Azure resources, subscriptions, and resource groups via MCP server

plugins.name: Microsoft SharePoint MCP
plugins.description: List, upload, and download files from SharePoint sites via MCP server
